jsonLd.title: Principal Investment Banker at CCAvenue
jsonLd.description:
We at CCAvenue are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About CCAvenue:
CCAvenue is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CCAvenue!
